name: Equitas PowerMiles Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 3 Reward Points / Rs 100 spent (3X on international)

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar quarter (8 per year) at 40+ lounges.
international: 1 complimentary international airport lounge visit per calendar quarter (4 per year) at 1000+ lounges worldwide.

exclusions: Fuel transactions (surcharge waiver only, no reward points)
additionalBenefits: Complimentary Club Marriott membership (up to 25% off on F&B, Hotel & Spa; complimentary membership for spouse)
Complimentary EazyDiner Prime membership (25–50% savings + 2,000 welcome EazyPoints + 2X EazyPoints on every meal)
24x7 global personal concierge services for travel, entertainment, and business
Air accident cover of Rs 1 crore (when flight tickets booked with PowerMiles card)
Zero lost card liability after reporting theft or fraud
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible transactions
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period
additionalDetails: 3X reward points on all international POS and online purchases
Base earn rate: 1 reward point per Rs 100 on domestic spends
1:1 Xchange Brands: Redeem points at 1:1 ratio (1 RP = Rs 1) for luxury brands – Apple iMagine, Tanishq, Taj Vouchers, M&S, The Body Shop
1:1 Xchange Miles: Convert reward points to miles/points with 10+ airline and hotel partners at 1:1 ratio (feature available from 01 Jul 2026)

hotelPartners.programme: Xchange Brands – Taj Vouchers / Luxury Catalog

transferPartnerValuations.programme: Xchange Brands (Apple iMagine, Tanishq, Taj, M&S, The Body Shop)

salaried: Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval
selfEmployed: Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval

internalNotes: Card details verified from official Equitas Bank archived page (Wayback Machine snapshot Jan 2026) on 2026-06-15.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Annual fee waiver: Rs 4,80,000 spend in anniversary year.
Forex markup: 2% on all foreign currency transactions (lower than Tiga/Selfe at 3.5%).
Xchange Miles (1:1 transfer to 10+ airline & hotel partners) feature is available from 01 Jul 2026 per official page.
Xchange Brands 1:1 luxury catalog redemption is live.
Lounge: 2 domestic per quarter (40+ lounges), 1 international per quarter (1000+ lounges).
Finance charges: 3.75% per month. Cash advance fee: 2.5% or Rs 250 whichever is higher.
Specific list of airline/hotel Xchange Miles partners not publicly disclosed on archived page; verify on Xchange portal (xchange.equitasbank.com).
